text:
There once was an old owl. He lived high up in woodland.

One sunny summer day he fell asleep. Perhaps from dreams.

Birds fluttered by. Maybe teasing. They chattered cruelly.

But sleepily he dreamed. Maybe gods? Surely.

They welcomed him. A realm unknown.

A palace shining. An eternal joy.

A hundred souls singing.

Or just one. Whispering softly.

Maybe that was best.

He would know his way.

That night he woke. Alone. Sad.

He listened. Nothing.

Maybe wisdom. Or folly?

He flew away. Only knew.
